creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 143760
Hopefully builds on FreeBSD 8 now.

pkg-plist lacks %%OPTION%% prefix before option-specific files. How they're expanded is usually decided by PLIST_SUB lines in the port Makefile.

JACK files are never installed while AVAHI, GCONF and HAL fail when de-selected

===>  Checking if audio/pulseaudio5 already installed
===>  Switching to root credentials for 'install' target
===>   Registering installation for pulseaudio-5.0_1
